chin_falam.hub.title: BehaviorLens
chin_falam.hub.subtitle: Functional Behavior Assessment, ABC data collection, and Behavior Intervention Plan tools.
chin_falam.hub.select_student_first: Select a student above to get started
chin_falam.hub.abc_desc: Record antecedent, behavior, and consequence observations
chin_falam.hub.obs_desc: Real-time interval, frequency, or duration recording
chin_falam.hub.overview_desc: Behavior trends, charts, and summary statistics
chin_falam.hub.interval_desc: Partial, whole, or momentary time sampling grid
chin_falam.hub.token_desc: Visual reinforcement board with customizable tokens
chin_falam.hub.hotspot_desc: Identify high-frequency behavior times across routines
chin_falam.hub.export_desc: Download ABC data and observations as JSON or text
chin_falam.hub.hypothesis_desc: Visual A→B→C→Function flow chart with AI generation
chin_falam.hub.goals_desc: AI-generated SMART behavior goals with progress tracking
chin_falam.hub.choice_desc: Student-facing visual choice cards for self-regulation
chin_falam.hub.audit_desc: 8-item classroom environment checklist with AI recommendations
chin_falam.hub.impact_desc: Quantify behavior frequency, duration, and annual cost
chin_falam.hub.datasheet_desc: Printable frequency, duration, ABC, or latency data sheets
chin_falam.hub.homenote_desc: AI-drafted parent communication with tone selector
chin_falam.hub.feasibility_desc: 5-question contextual fit assessment with AI recommendations
chin_falam.hub.gas_desc: Goal Attainment Scaling with AI-generated descriptors
chin_falam.hub.pocket_desc: Compact index-card BIP summary for clipboard carry
chin_falam.hub.abagraph_desc: Publication-standard graphs with phase lines, trend lines, and visual analysis
chin_falam.hub.abaguide_desc: Searchable glossary, reinforcement schedules, decision tree & common mistakes
chin_falam.hub.antecedentmod_desc: AI-powered environmental change recommendations to prevent behaviors before they start
chin_falam.hub.bcbahandoff_desc: Data dashboard for BCBAs + printable handoff packet for consultation
chin_falam.hub.casestudy_desc: AI-generated case studies with 4-phase clinical reasoning and scoring
chin_falam.hub.condprob_desc: Foreground vs background probability analysis to validate ABC hypotheses with data
chin_falam.hub.counseling_desc: AI role-play with student personas for counseling practice
chin_falam.hub.cultural_desc: 8-question pause-and-reflect checklist before interpreting behavior through a cultural humility lens
chin_falam.hub.drstrategy_desc: Choose the right differential reinforcement strategy (DRA, DRI, DRO, DRL)
chin_falam.hub.effectsize_desc: Calculate Tau-U, NAP, and PND to quantify intervention effectiveness with visual phase comparison
chin_falam.hub.fbaworkflow_desc: Step-by-step guided workflows for FBA, BIP, and RTI behavior tiers with AI coaching
chin_falam.hub.fcttemplate_desc: Functional Communication Training planning with modality selection
chin_falam.hub.gamify_desc: Student-facing mood tracker with streaks, badges, quests, and reflection journal
chin_falam.hub.glossary_desc: 25+ searchable ABA terms with plain-language definitions and real-world examples
chin_falam.hub.homelog_desc: Simplified parent-friendly behavior logging with everyday language
chin_falam.hub.iepgoals_desc: AI-generated present levels, SMART goals, objectives, accommodations, and progress monitoring plans
chin_falam.hub.iepprep_desc: AI-generated meeting preparation packet with data summary, talking points, and next steps
chin_falam.hub.intervention_desc: AI-generated multi-week intervention plan with measurable goals and milestones
chin_falam.hub.latency_desc: Stimulus-to-response time measurement with mean, median, and range statistics
chin_falam.hub.maintenance_desc: Track skill retention post-mastery and generalization across settings, people, and materials
chin_falam.hub.mtss_desc: Visual 3-tier pyramid for managing multi-tiered supports with AI-powered tier placement recommendations
chin_falam.hub.pdpath_desc: Guided onboarding modules for building ABA skills step-by-step
chin_falam.hub.progress_desc: IEP-ready progress monitoring paragraphs from accumulated behavioral data
chin_falam.hub.progressreport_desc: AI-generated progress reports with data summaries, trend analysis, goal progress, and parent-friendly language option
chin_falam.hub.qualitycheck_desc: AI-powered review of your ABC entries with specific improvement suggestions
chin_falam.hub.reframe_desc: AI rewrites deficit-based descriptions into asset-focused, strengths-based language
chin_falam.hub.replacebehavior_desc: Map behaviors of concern to functionally equivalent replacements with teaching strategies
chin_falam.hub.restorative_desc: Step-by-step scripts for harm repair, community circles, and reintegration conferences
chin_falam.hub.sandbox_desc: Load simulated student data for PD, pre-service training, or learning ABA without real students
chin_falam.hub.scdmanager_desc: AB, ABAB, Multiple Baseline, Alternating Treatments, Changing Criterion
chin_falam.hub.sessiontracker_desc: Systematic session-based behavioral measurement with rate calculation
chin_falam.hub.taskanalysis_desc: Break skills into teachable steps with forward, backward, or total-task chaining and prompt tracking
chin_falam.hub.teamnotes_desc: Multi-role timestamped collaboration thread for teachers, paras, counselors, and parents
chin_falam.hub.trends_desc: SVG charts showing intensity trends, setting frequency, and day/time heatmap
chin_falam.hub.bipgen_desc: Draft a Behavior Intervention Plan from your data.
chin_falam.hub.cantdowontdo_desc: Sort skill vs. performance deficits to pick the right support.
chin_falam.hub.competingpathways_desc: Map desired and replacement behaviors against the problem path.
chin_falam.hub.functionquiz_desc: Practice identifying behavior function from short scenarios.
chin_falam.hub.mipractice_desc: Rehearse MI conversations with simulated student responses.
chin_falam.hub.practicum_desc: Run a guided practice case from start to finish.
chin_falam.hub.replacementbehavior_desc: Identify a same-function behavior that meets the student’s need.

chin_falam.quick_fill_hint: AI will parse your description into the fields below. You can then edit manually.
chin_falam.quiz_fba_purpose: What is the primary purpose of an FBA?
chin_falam.search_placeholder: Search antecedent, behavior, consequence, notes, setting...
chin_falam.quick_fill_placeholder: e.g. "Student threw paper during math when asked to show work, teacher redirected calmly"
chin_falam.reinforce_step_1: Start with dense reinforcement (e.g., FR-1 or FR-2)
chin_falam.reinforce_step_2: Once behavior is consistent (~80%), increase ratio by 1-2
chin_falam.reinforce_step_3: Move to variable schedule (VR) for more natural maintenance
chin_falam.reinforce_step_4: Gradually increase VR value (VR-3 → VR-5 → VR-8)
chin_falam.record_tip_1: Include what happened before, during, and after the behavior
chin_falam.quiz_opt_identify_why: To identify WHY a behavior occurs
chin_falam.quiz_opt_any_stops: Any behavior that stops the problem
chin_falam.ph.a_break_help_someone_to_listen_space: A break? Help? Someone to listen? Space?
chin_falam.ph.add_a_team_note_shiftenter_for_new_li: Add a team note... (Shift+Enter for new line)
chin_falam.ph.add_context_constraints_or_specific_c: Add context, constraints, or specific challenges... e.g., "The student also has a speech delay" or "This is a middle school student"
chin_falam.ph.any_other_details_was_child_tired_hun: Any other details (was child tired, hungry, etc.)...
chin_falam.ph.describe_the_scenario_you_want_to_pra: Describe the scenario you want to practice with...
chin_falam.ph.describe_the_student_persona_eg_you_a: Describe the student persona... e.g., "You are a 3rd grader who becomes anxious during math and tends to cry and shut down..."
chin_falam.ph.eg_does_a_token_economy_reduce_offtas: e.g. "Does a token economy reduce off-task behavior during math instruction?"
chin_falam.ph.eg_handwashing_tying_shoes_morning_ro: e.g. Handwashing, Tying Shoes, Morning Routine
chin_falam.ph.eg_student_is_defiant_and_refuses_to_: e.g., "Student is defiant and refuses to follow directions."
chin_falam.ph.eg_student_with_autism_cooccurring_ad: e.g. "student with autism", "co-occurring ADHD", "new to the school"
chin_falam.ph.enter_the_behavioral_goal_to_scale_eg: Enter the behavioral goal to scale (e.g., "Student will remain in seat during independent work for 15 minutes")
chin_falam.ph.reflect_on_your_approachn_what_worked:
Reflect on your approach...
• What worked well?
• What would you do differently?
• What strategies do you want to practice next?
chin_falam.ph.target_behavior_what_you_want_to_redu: 🎯 Target behavior (what you want to reduce)
chin_falam.ph.type_your_observation_note_or_click_t: Type your observation, note, or click the mic to dictate...
chin_falam.ph.type_your_response_here_be_thorough_a: Type your response here. Be thorough and use professional language...
chin_falam.ph.what_could_you_or_a_grownup_do_differ: What could you or a grown-up do differently?
chin_falam.ph.what_environmental_change_will_you_ma: What environmental change will you make?
chin_falam.ph.what_made_you_feel_this_way_optional: What made you feel this way? (optional)
chin_falam.ph.what_was_going_on_before_you_felt_thi: What was going on before you felt this way?

lao.hub.obs_desc: Real-time interval, frequency, or duration recording
lao.hub.overview_desc: Behavior trends, charts, and summary statistics

lao.hub.goals_desc: AI-generated SMART behavior goals with progress tracking

lao.hub.impact_desc: Quantify behavior frequency, duration, and annual cost
lao.hub.datasheet_desc: Printable frequency, duration, ABC, or latency data sheets
lao.hub.homenote_desc: AI-drafted parent communication with tone selector
lao.hub.feasibility_desc: 5-question contextual fit assessment with AI recommendations
lao.hub.gas_desc: Goal Attainment Scaling with AI-generated descriptors
lao.hub.pocket_desc: Compact index-card BIP summary for clipboard carry
lao.hub.abagraph_desc: Publication-standard graphs with phase lines, trend lines, and visual analysis

lao.hub.condprob_desc: Foreground vs background probability analysis to validate ABC hypotheses with data
lao.hub.counseling_desc: AI role-play with student personas for counseling practice
lao.hub.cultural_desc: 8-question pause-and-reflect checklist before interpreting behavior through a cultural humility lens
lao.hub.drstrategy_desc: Choose the right differential reinforcement strategy (DRA, DRI, DRO, DRL)
lao.hub.effectsize_desc: Calculate Tau-U, NAP, and PND to quantify intervention effectiveness with visual phase comparison
lao.hub.fbaworkflow_desc: Step-by-step guided workflows for FBA, BIP, and RTI behavior tiers with AI coaching
lao.hub.fcttemplate_desc: Functional Communication Training planning with modality selection
lao.hub.gamify_desc: Student-facing mood tracker with streaks, badges, quests, and reflection journal
lao.hub.glossary_desc: 25+ searchable ABA terms with plain-language definitions and real-world examples
lao.hub.homelog_desc: Simplified parent-friendly behavior logging with everyday language
lao.hub.iepgoals_desc: AI-generated present levels, SMART goals, objectives, accommodations, and progress monitoring plans

lao.hub.intervention_desc: AI-generated multi-week intervention plan with measurable goals and milestones
lao.hub.latency_desc: Stimulus-to-response time measurement with mean, median, and range statistics
lao.hub.maintenance_desc: Track skill retention post-mastery and generalization across settings, people, and materials
lao.hub.mtss_desc: Visual 3-tier pyramid for managing multi-tiered supports with AI-powered tier placement recommendations
lao.hub.pdpath_desc: Guided onboarding modules for building ABA skills step-by-step
lao.hub.progress_desc: IEP-ready progress monitoring paragraphs from accumulated behavioral data
lao.hub.progressreport_desc: AI-generated progress reports with data summaries, trend analysis, goal progress, and parent-friendly language option
lao.hub.qualitycheck_desc: AI-powered review of your ABC entries with specific improvement suggestions
lao.hub.reframe_desc: AI rewrites deficit-based descriptions into asset-focused, strengths-based language
lao.hub.replacebehavior_desc: Map behaviors of concern to functionally equivalent replacements with teaching strategies
lao.hub.restorative_desc: Step-by-step scripts for harm repair, community circles, and reintegration conferences
lao.hub.sandbox_desc: Load simulated student data for PD, pre-service training, or learning ABA without real students
lao.hub.scdmanager_desc: AB, ABAB, Multiple Baseline, Alternating Treatments, Changing Criterion
lao.hub.sessiontracker_desc: Systematic session-based behavioral measurement with rate calculation
lao.hub.taskanalysis_desc: Break skills into teachable steps with forward, backward, or total-task chaining and prompt tracking

lao.hub.trends_desc: SVG charts showing intensity trends, setting frequency, and day/time heatmap

lao.hub.cantdowontdo_desc: Sort skill vs. performance deficits to pick the right support.
lao.hub.competingpathways_desc: Map desired and replacement behaviors against the problem path.
lao.hub.functionquiz_desc: Practice identifying behavior function from short scenarios.
lao.hub.mipractice_desc: Rehearse MI conversations with simulated student responses.
lao.hub.practicum_desc: Run a guided practice case from start to finish.

lao.quiz_fba_purpose: What is the primary purpose of an FBA?
lao.search_placeholder: Search antecedent, behavior, consequence, notes, setting...
lao.quick_fill_placeholder: e.g. "Student threw paper during math when asked to show work, teacher redirected calmly"
lao.reinforce_step_1: Start with dense reinforcement (e.g., FR-1 or FR-2)
lao.reinforce_step_2: Once behavior is consistent (~80%), increase ratio by 1-2
lao.reinforce_step_3: Move to variable schedule (VR) for more natural maintenance
lao.reinforce_step_4: Gradually increase VR value (VR-3 → VR-5 → VR-8)
lao.record_tip_1: Include what happened before, during, and after the behavior
lao.quiz_opt_identify_why: To identify WHY a behavior occurs
lao.quiz_opt_any_stops: Any behavior that stops the problem
lao.ph.a_break_help_someone_to_listen_space: A break? Help? Someone to listen? Space?
lao.ph.add_a_team_note_shiftenter_for_new_li: Add a team note... (Shift+Enter for new line)
lao.ph.add_context_constraints_or_specific_c: Add context, constraints, or specific challenges... e.g., "The student also has a speech delay" or "This is a middle school student"
lao.ph.any_other_details_was_child_tired_hun: Any other details (was child tired, hungry, etc.)...
lao.ph.describe_the_scenario_you_want_to_pra: Describe the scenario you want to practice with...
lao.ph.describe_the_student_persona_eg_you_a: Describe the student persona... e.g., "You are a 3rd grader who becomes anxious during math and tends to cry and shut down..."
lao.ph.eg_does_a_token_economy_reduce_offtas: e.g. "Does a token economy reduce off-task behavior during math instruction?"
lao.ph.eg_handwashing_tying_shoes_morning_ro: e.g. Handwashing, Tying Shoes, Morning Routine
lao.ph.eg_student_is_defiant_and_refuses_to_: e.g., "Student is defiant and refuses to follow directions."
lao.ph.eg_student_with_autism_cooccurring_ad: e.g. "student with autism", "co-occurring ADHD", "new to the school"
lao.ph.enter_the_behavioral_goal_to_scale_eg: Enter the behavioral goal to scale (e.g., "Student will remain in seat during independent work for 15 minutes")
